gist.headline: The sky is the limit
gist.blurb: The Bring Your Own Pollen consent screen now accepts an empty budget as 'unlimited'. The safety rails are officially optional.
gist.summary: Updated the BYOP consent screen and SDK to allow setting an explicit unlimited budget by passing a null value.
gist.impact: Users can now bypass the default budget cap when authorizing BYOP apps, enabling unrestricted usage for trusted applications.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot dealing with an overflowing, infinite amount of pollen/data. The concept of 'unlimited' represented by an infinity symbol or an overflowing container.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) infinity symbol. A chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, its screen showing a chart line going straight up and off the top edge. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
